info.title: Go Clean Template API

get.description: Retrieve endpoint histories with filtering and pagination
Retrieve audit logs with filtering and pagination
Get list of permissions with pagination and optional filtering
Get permission details by unique ID

post.description: Assign a scope (path + method) to a permission

delete.description: Remove a scope (path + method) from a permission

get.description: Get list of roles with pagination and optional filtering

post.description: Create a new role with name

get.description: Get role details by unique ID

post.description: Add a permission to a role

delete.description: Remove a permission from a role

post.description: Assign a role to a user

get.description: List all active sessions for the current user

delete.description: Revoke all sessions for a specific device

post.description: Revoke all user sessions except the current one (Currently revokes current one as placeholder)

get.description: Retrieve system errors with filtering and pagination
Returns a list of system errors. If Accept header includes text/html, returns a styled HTML page. Otherwise returns JSON.

parameters.description: Error Category (Data, Validation, Security, System, Business)
parameters.name: category

post.description: Register a new user with username, phone and password

get.description: Retrieve a user's details by their ID

details.example: The user with the ID '12345' does not exist in our records.
